meaning: n.瓷器,瓷adj.瓷制的,精美的,脆的
examples: There were lilies everywhere in tall white porcelain vases.
To this class of substance belong mica, porcelain, quartz, glass, wood, etc.
Her skin is porcelain with a smattering of freckles and she is slender, almost fashion-skinny.
Erected in 1928, its interiors are opulent, with heavy silk curtains, porcelain antiques and dark-wood furniture.
Antonio Capelao, of London's Bicha Gallery, was betting on artist Anna Barlow's porcelain ice-cream sculptures.
